productDisplayName: Levis Men Grey & Black Striped Shirt
description: Composition Grey and black striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a full front button placket, half sleeves, pocket on the left chest with branding, and a curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron This Levi's cotton shirt traces a relaxed silhouette flattering all body shapes to make you look your casual best. This off-duty essential is a must-have for the modern urban male. Slip into jeans with sneakers or suede shoes to complement this trendy-yet-classic shirt. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
